title: Republic Act No. 9430
text:
Republic of the Philippines

Congress of the Philippines

Metro Manila

Thirteenth Congress

Third Regular Session

Begun and held in Metro Manila, on Monday, the twenty-fourth day of July, two thousand six.

[REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9430 ]

AN ACT DECLARING JULY 23 OF EACH YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF TANAUAN, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS TO BE KNOWN AS “APOLINARIO MABINI DAY”

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. To commemorate the birth anniversary of Apolinario Mabini, national hero and illustrious son of the City of Tanauan, Province of Batangas, July 23 of each year is hereby declared a special working holiday in the said city to be known as “Apolinario Mabini Day”.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) MANNY VILLAR President of the Senate

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR. Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 7, 2007 and January 22, 2007, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: APR 10 2007

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO President of the Philippines

Source: CDAsia
